insight_canon_verbatim: Building a business in the age of AI means treating every workflow as code, every customer interaction as data, and every decision as a prompt. The winners won't be those who automate tasks. They'll be those who rebuild their operating model around what AI makes newly possible, compounding their advantages.
concept_cles: AI-Native Operating Model: rebuilding the business around AI capabilities
Workflow-as-Code: treating every repeatable process as programmable
Compounding Advantage: AI integration generates data improving next iteration
Decision-as-Prompt: encoding strategic decisions as structured prompts
Customer Interaction Data Loop: capturing touchpoints as structured data
outils_souverains_alignment: Claude/Anthropic + AaaS Doctrine 3 Variants Solaris/Nexus/Orbiter sovereign abstraction
Airtable + PARA Enterprise sovereign tables in Supabase Cloud Life OS
Notion + L2 Business OS canon _SPECS/ADR/L2_Business_OS ADRs as single source of truth
anti_paperclip_rationale: Guide is conceptual/strategic with no quantitative unit economics. Cannot verify opex<15%MR or LTV:CAC>=3:1 - financial discipline lives in sister ADR-AAAS-PRICING-001. No greenwashing or autonomous-dumping red flags detected, but D1 verification of sobriety metrics requires sister ADRs.
